title: allmania nodiflora var. aspera
intro: Allmania nodiflora var. aspera, also known as Indian ashwagandha or dwarf Indian ashwagandha, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the amaranth family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and adaptogenic properties. The health benefits of Allmania nodiflora var. aspera include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, such as capsules, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
